title: elymus caninus var. donianus
intro: Elymus caninus var. donianus, also known as don's wheatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus caninus var. donianus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or dried and used as a supplement, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
